definitions: Gentleness and kindness; kindliness.
Sensitivity to pain; soreness.

definitions: A statistical technique in which data from a large number of sites or populations are represented as points in a multidimensional space.

definitions: A drink made from the juice of pressed fruit.

definitions: Compress (a file) so that it takes less space in storage.
Move at high speed.

definitions: Cause (an animal of one species, breed, or variety) to breed with one of another species, breed, or variety.

definitions: A Christian minister's pastoral charge or area of responsibility for spiritual ministry.

definitions: Take care of temporarily.

definitions: A quantity obtained by multiplying quantities together, or from an analogous algebraic operation.
An article or substance that is manufactured or refined for sale.

definitions: A visible duplication of part of the design for a postage stamp due to an inaccurate first impression.

definitions: A structure of hexagonal cells of wax, made by bees to store honey and eggs.

definitions: A set of five parallel lines on any one or between any adjacent two of which a note is written to indicate its pitch.

definitions: The total sum of the bets made on a round in poker, brag, etc.

definitions: A company involved in broadcasting of a specified kind.

definitions: One of two or more identical things.

definitions: A container for liquids.

definitions: A piece of furniture with a flat top and one or more legs, providing a level surface for eating, writing, or working at.

definitions: The thorny European shrub which bears gooseberries.
A third person in the company of two people, especially lovers, who would prefer to be alone.

definitions: A stupid or foolish person.
A brief downward slope followed by an upward one.
example: He's such a dip sometimes.

definitions: A compartment with a specified function in a vehicle, aircraft, or ship.

definitions: The quality of being amusing or comic, especially as expressed in literature or speech.

example: Traditionally, disease is seen as the effect of bad winds and an imbalance of the four humors of the body.

definitions: The way in which something, especially an organization or equipment, is organized, planned, or arranged.

definitions: A biscuit containing a layer of compressed currants.

definitions: Originate from.

definitions: A floor or level of a building or structure.
A stagecoach.

definitions: The movement of a matador's cape away from a charging bull.

definitions: Make progress; develop in a particular manner or direction.

definitions: A low frame bordering a fireplace to prevent burning coals from falling out.

definitions: A train carrying sleeping cars.
A ring or post worn in a pierced ear to keep the hole from closing.

definitions: A small insect.
An error in a computer program or system.

definitions: A member of certain North American peoples such as the Chinook, Choctaw, and Salish, named from their supposed practice of flattening their children's heads artificially.

definitions: A jet of flame.

definitions: Purify or refine (a substance) by repeated or continuous distillation.

definitions: Subject (a device) to control by another.

definitions: The action of consenting to receive or undertake something offered.

definitions: A badge bearing a design or slogan and pinned to clothing.
